LINE_SRVC_CNT 
LABEL: 
Line Service Count 
DESCRIPTION: The count of the total number of services processed for the line item on the non-institutional claim.

LONG NAME: LINE_SRVC_CNT 
TYPE: 
NUM

12 
SOURCE: 
CMS Encounter Data System (EDS)

DME Line 
VALUES: 
0 – XXXX (numeric values may include decimals)

—
